title: Language state graph
description: OSM-style hidden-state model for Arabic surface tokens. The live qamus-highlight keys ONLY by a vowel-stripped norm_strict key; a single observation (key) may emit from MORE THAN ONE hidden state (lemma / POS / form / sense). This graph makes those splits explicit so a gloss is exported only when ONE hidden state owns the key (or all states agree). Built read-only by tools/build_language_state_graph.py; queried by tools/query_language_state.py.

built_from.description: Provenance of the build (no private paths).

counts.description: Reconciliation tallies; every key has exactly one decision class.

states.description: One node per distinct norm_strict key.
